Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: Keep in mind that you can also use the Tactical Display (minimap) to set waypoints and let your fellow officers conn the ship. With the unit selected, right click anywhere on the map to set a waypoint.
The ship's officers will now control the rudder and move to the assigned waypoint at the speed you have set for this vessel. Feel free to change the speed as needed.
You can hold Shift while setting waypoints to queue up multiple waypoints.
